title: Number of Sub-arrays With Odd Sum
titleCn: 和为奇数的子数组数目

testcases.input: arr = [1,3,5] Output: 4 Explanation: All subarrays are [[1],[1,3],[1,3,5],[3],[3,5],[5]] All sub-arrays sum are [1,4,9,3,8,5]. Odd sums are [1,9,3,5] so the answer is 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: All subarrays are [[1],[1,3],[1,3,5],[3],[3,5],[5]] All sub-arrays sum are [1,4,9,3,8,5]. Odd sums are [1,9,3,5] so the answer is 4.

testcases.input: arr = [2,4,6] Output: 0 Explanation: All subarrays are [[2],[2,4],[2,4,6],[4],[4,6],[6]] All sub-arrays sum are [2,6,12,4,10,6]. All sub-arrays have even sum and the answer is 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: All subarrays are [[2],[2,4],[2,4,6],[4],[4,6],[6]] All sub-arrays sum are [2,6,12,4,10,6]. All sub-arrays have even sum and the answer is 0.
